speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 short options dena jo relation-safe aur practical ho.
text: Teen chhote options: (1) kal office se pehle 2 min slow breathing, (2) notes mein 3 line likho - Boss ki line, tumhara response, kal ka pehla task, (3) ghar mein trusted insaan ko bolo aaj 10 min Papa ki EMI plan pe baithna hai. Jo easiest lage woh lo.

speaker: Seeker

text: Notes wala aur EMI plan wala kar sakti hoon.

text: Likha maine, ab thoda control sa lag raha.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri parvarish par sawal hoga aur khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi
